mapper.select: SELECT /* CanMgmtMapper.getCanMgmtList */ CONTRACT_NUM, CUSTOMER_ID, SUBSCRIBER_NO FROM (SELECT CONTRACT_NUM, CUSTOMER_ID, SUBSCRIBER_NO FROM PPS_CAN_USR_MST WHERE PROC_STATUS = 'R' ORDER BY REGST_DTTM ASC) WHERE ROWNUM <= (SELECT ETC1 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'DEV0000' AND CD_VAL = 'LIMIT')
